Check_Question: Are user prompts validated before processing?
Mitigation_Action: Validate user input and filter inappropriate prompts before sending requests to the AI service.
Store user email securely and never display personal information on public pages.

Check_Question: Can invalid search input cause errors?
Mitigation_Action: Validate search keywords and display friendly messages when no movies are found.

Check_Question: Can only the account owner manage their watchlist?
Mitigation_Action: Restrict watchlist access to the logged-in user and require authentication before editing.
Implement role-based access control so only administrators can access the dashboard and analytics.

Check_Question: Is recommendation history visible only to the user?
Mitigation_Action: Allow only authenticated users to view or delete their own recommendation history.

Check_Question: Are API keys hidden from users?
Mitigation_Action: Store OpenAI and TMDB API keys in server-side environment variables and never expose them in client-side code.

Check_Question: Are external API requests made securely?
Mitigation_Action: Use HTTPS for all API requests and validate responses before displaying data.

Check_Question: Does the prototype use sample or non-sensitive data?
Mitigation_Action: Use fictional user accounts and sample movie preferences for demonstrations and usability testing.
